Investors can find opportunity in a trade war, advisor says
Inflation protection for your portfolio? This fund has an allocation strategy that can work to your advantage.
Real assets may still prosper as Fed fights inflation: it's hard to get ‘inflationary genie' back in the bottle, says this ETF portfolio manager

overview.description: The VanEck Real Assets ETF (RAAX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund of funds that seeks to maximize long-term real returns. It invests in ETPs with exposure to real assets, such as real estate, commodities, natural resources, or infrastructure, and may hold up to 100% cash or equivalents. RAAX was launched on Apr 9, 2018 and is issued by VanEck.
